unit_source.description: inline | pam | amp | oamp | artesian | files | ...

session.description: Optional work-session identity for cross-agent handoff. A resumable bundle is addressed by (user_id, session_id, task_id); agent_id changes on handoff and is recorded in handed_off_from.

session_id.description: stable id for this work session

handed_off_from.description: agent_id of the runtime that last committed this bundle
